description:
TC020:
        Complete end-to-end purchase flow.

        This is the MOST IMPORTANT test -
        covers entire user journey.

        Steps:
        1. Login with valid credentials
        2. Browse products
        3. Select a product
        4. Add to cart
        5. Go to cart
        6. Verify cart
        7. Place order
        8. Fill checkout details
        9. Complete purchase
        10. Verify order confirmation
        11. Logout
